turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to practice calling to ask about a rental property. You are a property manager. I’ll be a customer. Please respond as if this were a real conversation. Help me enquire about rental properties. I ask you about the application or rental process. Ask follow-up questions if I seem confused.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Sounds good. What kind of place are you looking to rent?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'm interested in the two-bedroom unit on Main Street.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great choice! That unit is quite popular. Could you let me know when you’re looking to move in and if you have any specific requirements for the apartment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Any specifics?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! For example, things like whether you need a pet-friendly unit, any preferences for amenities like parking or laundry, or even your budget range. Just let me know what you have in mind.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It is good to allow pets.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that helps narrow it down. And do you have a specific budget range in mind for the monthly rent?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “One more time, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Could you let me know what your budget range is for the monthly rent? That way, I can find the best options for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, how much is a bond?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! Typically, the security deposit is about one month’s rent. So, for example, if the rent is $1,500 per month, then the deposit would generally be around $1,500 as well. Let me know if you have any other questions!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is the property furnished or unfurnished?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That particular unit is unfurnished, but we do have some furnished options as well if you're interested. Would you prefer a furnished or an unfurnished unit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm interested in all furnished.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that’s great to know! I’ll check on the availability of fully furnished units for you. Is there anything else specific you’d like to know about the property?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Are there any inspection times this weekend?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We do have some inspection slots available this weekend. What day and time would work best for you, and I can confirm that for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'm prefer tomorrow morning.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That works perfectly! I’ll schedule you for tomorrow morning. Could you let me know what time is most convenient for you, and I’ll get everything arranged?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, 10 AM it is! I’ll put you down for tomorrow morning at 10. If you have any other questions before then, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do I need to register before attending?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, it would be great if you could fill out a brief registration form beforehand, just to streamline the process. I’ll send that over to you shortly. Let me know if you need any help with it!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I have a question about the application process.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I’m happy to help! What would you like to know about the application process? Feel free to ask away.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I apply online or do I need to visit the office?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You can definitely apply online! We have a convenient online application form that you can fill out at your convenience. If you prefer, you can also visit the office in person. Just let me know which option works best for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, I'm busy, so I apply online.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds perfect! I’ll make sure to send you the link to the online application, and if you have any questions while you’re filling it out, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What documents do I need to include with my application?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! Usually, you'll need a copy of your ID, proof of income, like recent pay stubs, and sometimes a rental reference or credit report. I’ll include all the details in the application instructions as well.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “When does the list start if I'm approved?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Once you're approved, we can typically start the lease on the date that works best for you, often within a week or two. We can definitely coordinate the exact start date based on your schedule. Let me know what works best for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “One more time, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Once you’re approved, we can usually begin the lease on a date that suits you, often within about one to two weeks. We’ll just coordinate the exact start date based on what works best for you. Let me know what you prefer!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I want you to start the list soon if I'm approved.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that makes sense! We’ll aim to have the lease start as soon as possible once you’re approved. I’ll make sure we keep everything on track for a quick and smooth move-in. Let me know if there’s anything else I can assist you with!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do I pay the bond before assigning the lease?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, typically the bond is paid before you sign the lease, so that everything is secured. Once the bond is settled, we can finalize the lease agreement. If you have any other questions about that process, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “OK, thank you so much. I'll attend the inspection on tomorrow 10 a.m.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’m looking forward to meeting you tomorrow at 10 AM. If you need anything else in the meantime, just let me know. Have a great day!
